Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class PosInOccurrence

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.PosInOccurrence
public final class PosInOccurrence extends Object
This class describes a position in an occurrence of a term. A SequentFormula and a PosInTerm determine an object of this class exactly.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    PosInOccurrence(SequentFormula sequentFormula, PosInTerm posInTerm, boolean inAntec)

    Method
    Description
    int
    depth()
     
    PosInOccurrence
    down(int i)
    creates a new PosInOccurrence that has exactly the same state as this object except the PosInTerm is new and walked down the specified subterm, as specified in method down of PosInTerm.
    boolean
    eqEquals(Object obj)
    compares this PosInOccurrence with another PosInOccurrence and returns true if both describe the same occurrence
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
    Contrary to eqEquals, this method returns true only for pio objects that point to the same (identical) formula

    findInSequent(Sequent seq, int formulaNumber, PosInTerm pos)

    boolean

    returns true iff the occurrence is in the antecedent of a sequent.

    iterator()
    List all subterms between the root and the position this objects points to; the first term is the whole term constrainedFormula().formula(), the last one subTerm()

  • Constructor Details

    • PosInOccurrence

      public PosInOccurrence(SequentFormula sequentFormula, PosInTerm posInTerm, boolean inAntec)

  • Method Details

    • findInSequent

      public static PosInOccurrence findInSequent(Sequent seq, int formulaNumber, PosInTerm pos)

    • sequentFormula

      public SequentFormula sequentFormula()
      returns the SequentFormula that determines the occurrence of this PosInOccurrence

    • depth

      public int depth()
      Returns:
      Depth of the represented position within a formula; top-level positions (isTopLevel() have depth zero

    • down

      public PosInOccurrence down(int i)
      creates a new PosInOccurrence that has exactly the same state as this object except the PosInTerm is new and walked down the specified subterm, as specified in method down of PosInTerm.

    • eqEquals

      public boolean eqEquals(Object obj)
      compares this PosInOccurrence with another PosInOccurrence and returns true if both describe the same occurrence

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Contrary to eqEquals, this method returns true only for pio objects that point to the same (identical) formula
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the Object to which this one is compared
      Returns:
      true if both objects are equal

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Returns:
      the number/index of the deepest subterm that this PosInOccurrence points to. If the position is top-level, the result will be -1

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • isInAntec

      public boolean isInAntec()
      returns true iff the occurrence is in the antecedent of a sequent.

    • isTopLevel

      public boolean isTopLevel()

    • iterator

      public PIOPathIterator iterator()
      List all subterms between the root and the position this objects points to; the first term is the whole term constrainedFormula().formula(), the last one subTerm()
      Returns:
      an iterator that walks from the root of the term to the position this PosInOccurrence-object points to

    • posInTerm

      public PosInTerm posInTerm()
      The usage of this method is strongly discouraged, use iterator() instead. describes the exact occurrence of the referred term inside SequentFormula.formula()
      Returns:
      the position in the formula of the SequentFormula of this PosInOccurrence.

    • replaceConstrainedFormula

      public PosInOccurrence replaceConstrainedFormula(SequentFormula p_newFormula)
      Replace the formula this object points to with the new formula given
      Parameters:
      p_newFormula - the new formula
      Returns:
      a PosInOccurrence object that points to the same position within the formula p_newFormula as this object does within the formula constrainedFormula(). It is not tested whether this position exists within p_newFormula

    • subTerm

      public Term subTerm()
      returns the subterm this object points to

    • topLevel

      public PosInOccurrence topLevel()
      Ascend to the top node of the formula this object points to

    • toString

      public String toString()
      toString
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • up

      public PosInOccurrence up()
      Ascend to the parent node
